prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约25866名、24573名、23726名、25630名、28606名。2021至2023年位次逐年小幅前移（数字减小），2024年回落 至25630名，2025年大幅后移至28606名，近两年累计后移约4880名，呈明显后移趋势。2025年基准位次约28606名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年28人、2 022年21人、2023年18人、2024年10人、2025年9人，呈逐年递减趋势。2026年计划招生13人，较2025年扩招约44.4%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2025年第180名、2026年第177名，排名略有上升，属体育类院校中层次最高的学府；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及CUVA排球决赛中主场球迷争议事件，可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第18（高热），短视频平台曝光量较高，综合来看声誉信号 偏负面但关注度不低；北京体育大学以体育学为核心优势学科（第五轮学科评估预计为A+），但浙江省综合类招生专业主要为新闻学、网络与新媒体、公共事业 管理、汉语国际教育、英语、应用心理学、数据科学与大数据技术等非体育类专业，与体育学关联度较低。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播类专业社会热度明显降温（明显劝退 ），外语类专业一般观望，计算机/数据科学类偏热推荐。浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年的29万人大幅增长约37.6%，竞争压力显著增大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年计划扩招44.4%（缓解竞争）、浙江省考生 总数大幅增长37.6%（加剧竞争）以及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招与考生增长两股力量相互对冲，但考生增幅略低于扩招幅度，且2025年已出现明显后移惯性，预计2026年最低录取 位次在2025年基准28606名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约36434名，区间35934–36934名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 25866, 24573, 23726, 25630, and 28606 respectively. Rankings moved slightly forward (decreasing numbers) year by year from 2021 to 2023, then fell back to 25630 in 2024, and significantly dropped to 28606 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4880 over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 28606. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province was 28 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 9 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year. The 2026 plan is to enroll 13 students, an increase of about 44.4% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will notably impact the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, with a slight upward trend. It is the highest-level institution among sports colleges. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversial incidents with home fans during the CUVA volleyball finals, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. It ranks 18th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms. Overall, the reputation signal is somewhat negative but attention is not low. Beijing Sport University's core advantage is sports science (expected to be A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), but the comprehensive category enrollment majors in Zhejiang Province are mainly non-sports majors such as Journalism, Network and New Media, Public Administration, Chinese International Education, English, Applied Psychology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc., with low correlation to sports science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of journalism and communication majors has significantly cooled (clearly discouraged), foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see, and computer/data science majors are relatively hot and recommended. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 290,000 in 2025, greatly increasing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the 44.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the 37.6% increase in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, the forces of expansion and candidate growth offset each other, but the candidate growth rate is slightly lower than the expansion rate, and there is already a clear backward inertia in 2025. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 28606. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36434, with a range of 35934–36934.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 35934–36934, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely use Tier 3 majors as backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (i.e., less than 35934), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Journalism and Network and New Media. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 36934), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors. New majors in 2026 such as Human Movement Science, Sports Economics and Management, Intelligent Sports Engineering, and Sports Rehabilitation, due to first-time enrollment and lack of historical ranking references, may offer opportunities for low-score pickups and can be attempted as appropriate.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学是教育部直属的211工程重点建设高校，同时入选国家双一流建设高校，位于北京市。作为国内体育类院校的最高学府，其医学类（康复物理治疗）专业依托学校在 运动科学领域的深厚积淀，具有较高的学科认可度和行业影响力。

There is no separate Medicine admission data for 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan document does not list a separate Medicine plan, so the 2025 plan number (i.e., the 2024 plan of 1 student) is used for calculation, with a plan change rate of 0. In recent years, the ranking has shown a fluctuating downward trend, with the 2024 ranking dropping by approximately 3680 places compared to 2023, indicating intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a key university under the Ministry of Education, a 211 Project key construction university, and also selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Beijing. As the highest institution in the field of sports in China, its Medicine (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) major relies on the university's deep accumulation in sports science, possessing high disciplinary recognition and industry influence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Rehabilitation Physical Therapy major has seen increasing popularity in recent years with the advancement of the Healthy China strategy and the growth of sports rehabilitation demand. As a major province for the college entrance examination, Zhejiang has high attention from candidates towards Medicine and Rehabilitation majors. Beijing Sport University is located in the capital Beijing, with strong regional appeal, but the Medicine enrollment plan is extremely small (only 1-2 students per year), leading to significant ranking fluctuations due to the small plan size.

The fluctuation range is 28159 to 29159.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beijing Sport University only offers one Medicine major, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, in Zhejiang Province, with an extremely small enrollment plan (1-2 students) and significant ranking fluctuations. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range may attempt to apply, but it is recommended to also prepare other universities' Medicine or Rehabilitation majors as backups.
